hard_rejections.common_shift_invariant_functionals: cannot emit A_ch because they satisfy F(logm + c*(1,1,1)) = F(logm)

must_use: theorem-grade charged sector-response artifact after C_hat_e promotion

notes: This scaffold exists to package the exact future contract for the charged absolute anchor.
Promotion of C_hat_e^cand is upstream and necessary, but not sufficient: it promotes theorem-grade centered data, not the affine common-shift breaker itself.
Any candidate A_ch must exhibit the affine +c covariance explicitly, not merely reproduce one preferred numerical representative.
Once a refinement-stable uncentered trace lift exists on theorem-grade physical Y_e or an equivalent determinant line, A_ch is induced rather than independent.

mandatory_package_a.current_strength_statement: neither exact vanishing nor uniform quadratic smallness is proved on the live corpus
mandatory_package_a.immediate_downstream_effect: If the upstream splitting theorem closes and C_hat_e^{cand} is promoted to theorem-grade C_hat_e, then eta and sigma become charged spectral invariants rather than independent primitive theorem objects.
mandatory_package_a.summary: Promote the latent charged operator candidate C_hat_e^{cand} to theorem-grade declaration by closing the quotient-natural charged sector-response functor on the shared OPH flavor dictionary.

mandatory_package_b.immediate_downstream_effect: Once the determinant line is carried by the promoted charged response, the affine coordinate A_ch is read out canonically as (1/3) log det(Y_e).
mandatory_package_b.summary: Derive one theorem-grade uncentered determinant-line section of the charged response so the lost affine common-shift mode is restored before any absolute anchor is read out.

mandatory_package_c.immediate_downstream_effect: Once A_ch exists, the absolute charged scale is emitted by g_e = exp(A_ch), and Delta_e_abs follows as log(g_ch_shared) - A_ch.
mandatory_package_c.summary: Read out the affine charged absolute coordinate A_ch from the determinant-line section, with A_ch(logm + c*(1,1,1)) = A_ch(logm) + c.

optional_package_d.summary: Retain a charged holonomy bridge only if the older delta = 2/9 D12 benchmark is kept as a theorem-grade bridge instead of a diagnostic continuation.
